title: The Rainy Vacation
content: Olivia imagined sunny weather throughout her vacation, but rain arrived almost every day instead. At first, she felt disappointed because many outdoor activities became impossible. Eventually, she decided to adapt her plans. She visited museums, explored indoor markets, and spent afternoons in cozy cafés reading books. Surprisingly, the rainy atmosphere gave the city a special charm. Wet streets reflected colorful lights, and fewer tourists crowded the attractions. By the end of the trip, Olivia realized that unexpected weather did not have to ruin a vacation. Sometimes it simply created a different kind of experience.
